description: Returns task metadata, optionally last session summary, or task prompt content when promptOnly is enabled.

uuid.description: Task UUID. Optional if name is provided or current session belongs to a task.

name.description: Task name/slug. Used when uuid is not provided.

summary.description: If true, include last session summary (metadata and markdown summary text).

promptOnly.description: If true/"yes", return only task.md content in vfsRead-like content format with line numbers.
